scripts.typecheck: npm run build:config && npm -w no-grid run typecheck && npm -w legacy-grid run typecheck && npm -w react-app run typecheck && npm -w angular-app run typecheck
scripts.build: npm run build:config && npm -w react-app run build && npm -w angular-app run build
scripts.dev:react: npm run build:config && npm -w react-app run dev
scripts.dev:angular: npm run build:config && npm -w angular-app run dev
